title: 52 PCS Foil Letter Balloons, 2 Sets of A-Z Alphabet Balloon personalised banner for Birthday/Baby Shower/Wedding Party Decorations(silver)
features: Package Content: You'll receive 2 sets of 26 letter balloons, accompanied by a air pump, 80 glue dots, two 20-meter rolls of ribbon, and 2 straws
Long-Lasting: Helium-free, simply inflate our balloons to 95% using the included pump for over one weeks of vibrant beauty. Self-sealing, deflating is a breeze with the provided straws post-party
Individual Letter Packaging: Each letter in this set is packaged separately, ensuring you can swiftly locate the desired letters.

Multiple Colors: Black,Gold,Silver,Blue,Pink,Red,choose from trendy hues letter balloons that perfectly complement any celebration theme. Whether it's an anniversary, birthday, Graduation, New Year, dance party, bridal shower, engagement soiree, gender reveal, or simply adding fun and personality to your living space, these 14-inch foil balloon letters elevate every party or event with individuality.

Spell It Out: Make letter balloons to balloon banner! Whether commemorating "Graduation Day" or "Welcome Home," why not even make a bold romantic gesture, "¿Quieres ser mi novia?" (Will you be my girlfriend?). From heartfelt proposals and joyous birthday wishes to greetings, let your imagination soar and customize unforgettable party highlights.
